name: Daymon
what_it_does: Desktop application that extends Claude with persistent background automation, scheduled task execution, memory management, file watching, and worker agents. Runs as a menu bar/system tray app with a Node.js sidecar for scheduling and an MCP server for Claude integration. Supports pre-configured worker personalities (researcher, code reviewer, email assistant, etc.) and self-improving tasks that optimize based on execution history.
use_cases: Scheduling recurring AI tasks (daily summaries, competitor tracking, code reviews)
Persistent memory/knowledge graph across Claude sessions
File system monitoring with automated AI responses
Running specialized worker agents with custom system prompts
Auto-nudging active Claude Code sessions with background task results
not_for: Users without a Claude subscription (Pro, Max, or Team required)
Server-side or headless automation (it's a desktop app)
Non-Claude AI assistants (tightly coupled to Claude ecosystem)
Users wanting cloud-based scheduling (this is local-first)
best_when: You want Claude to run background tasks 24/7 on your local machine — scheduled reports, file monitoring, persistent memory — without API keys or cloud dependencies.
avoid_when: You need server-side automation, don't have a Claude subscription, or want cloud-hosted scheduling. Also early-stage (v0.1.x) so expect rough edges.

alternatives.name: Claude Code with cron
alternatives.note: Manual cron + Claude Code for scheduled tasks without a GUI

alternatives.name: n8n
alternatives.note: Self-hosted workflow automation, more general but no native Claude MCP

auth.notes: No API keys needed. Requires active Claude subscription (Pro, Max, or Team). Auto-configures Claude Desktop MCP on first launch.

pricing.free_tier_limits: App is free; requires paid Claude subscription for AI functionality.
pricing.notes: MIT licensed. Not affiliated with Anthropic. Claude subscription cost is separate.

performance.rate_limits: Constrained by Claude subscription rate limits.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: No error handling documentation found. Desktop app likely surfaces errors in UI but MCP tool error responses are undocumented.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Memory and list operations are idempotent. Schedule creation and worker creation are not — can create duplicates.
known_agent_gotchas: Early stage (v0.1.x) — expect breaking changes and rough edges
Tightly coupled to Claude ecosystem — won't work with other LLMs
Desktop app must be running for scheduled tasks to execute
Claude subscription rate limits apply to all background task execution
Not affiliated with Anthropic — third-party tool
Local embeddings via HuggingFace Transformers may be slow on first run

security_score_components.security_notes: Day monitoring/scheduling MCP. Local execution. Calendar/time data may include personal schedule. No remote auth for local use.
